title: The Zombie Conquest
description: Fight for your life in a world conquered by zombies!
body:
[![Banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/ZA/BH_ZA_Header.webp)](https://bit.ly/4nTC2p4) Due to many requests, we have published most of our modpacks on Modrinth. But keep the following in mind: - There are many **content and optimization** mods that can't be added to Modrinth (they don't allow it). - We are also **unable to upload serverpacks** here. **If you want to play with the full experience, we strongly recommend that you download the [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/zombie-apocalypse-renewed) version.** ## The world we all know has been conquered by huge and dangerous hordes of zombies. You are the only one who can save it, make your base and do not allow the zombies to get close to you, manage to kill them one by one, but remember, **YOU ONLY HAVE ONE LIFE**, if you are not careful, they will kill you. Main features: - The player only has one life, and is not able to recover hearts normally, only by consuming golden apples, potions or similar. - Huge hordes of zombies have taken over the world. - Essential mods have been added to improve the experience. If you want to revive and enjoy an easier gaming experience, **[you can download this other version.](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/zombie-apocalypse-easy-mode)** ### Do you need a server to play with your friends? ###

If you are looking for a server to play any modpack with your friends, [**Bisect Hosting**](https://bit.ly/4nTC2p4) is your solution! They have the best quality-price Minecraft servers, and with the code "Lupin" you will receive a 25% discount. ![Summary](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/ZA/BH_ZA_Summary.webp) With this modpack you will live a gaming experience you have never lived before! Of course, the only enemies you will encounter will be the classic zombies, which in fact, will be stronger and more powerful than ever. But... don't think that's all, you will ONLY HAVE ONE LIFE! That is, when you die, you will not be able to reappear and play in the same world, yes, what you are reading. Be very careful and watch your back if you want to enter every day to play... You will really live a great experience. 🚫 You will enjoy a completely new experience! Only Zombies will exist!!! This is due to Bad Mobs, which has allowed us to eliminate the rest of the vanilla creatures. 🤌 Don't worry about the loots, you will be able to get the basic items such as bones, gunpowder, etc, thanks to Mob Drops Recipes. 🔝 The game experience changes completely, being much more immersive with mods like AmbientSounds, Serene Seasons or Sound Physics Remastered, among many, many other cool mods. 🧟‍♂️ But be careful, you won't face normal Zombies, we have included the fantastic Zombie Awareness mod, which will completely change the way they are. 😎 It's a modpack optimized for practically any device, we have added a lot of optimizing mods, and also ideal for server, like Spark, Xenon or Oculus! What are you waiting to play? ☠️ Attention. In this modpack you will ONLY have one life, if you die, it's all over... In addition, the way to recover hearts will not be the same... Hardcore Mode 2.0 will completely change the way you play. Although remember that if you prefer to play a game with respawns, you can play the [EASY MODE](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/zombie-apocalypse-easy-mode). ![FAQ](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/ZA/BH_ZA_FAQ.webp) ### Minecraft keeps loading? You enter the world but your FPS is low? ### Please make sure to [increase the RAM](https://mundominecraft.net/en/allocate-more-ram/) in case you need it, most problems are due to this. If you use the curseforge app, it's as easy as clicking on profile options, uncheck the option to use default memory system and move the bar to the right (at least we recommend 6GB or 6144 MB). ### Is there an error with your server? ### Unfortunately, when setting up a server on your own, or hiring a hosting that I have not recommended, the modpack may not work. All my modpacks work perfectly with **[Bisect Hosting](https://bit.ly/4nTC2p4)**, so I recommend 100% to hire such hosting. Also, you will get a **[25% discount if you do it through this link](https://bit.ly/4nTC2p4)** and use the code "Lupin". Please note that for this modpack, we recommend a minimum of 7GB of RAM. If you are a large number of players, you should consider increasing the amount of RAM even more. ### Is there a way to revive with this modpack? ### No, of course not. When you die, you will die forever and will not be able to play in your world again. Please keep in mind, it is not a modpack to play a 1,000 hour world, it is to enjoy a new gaming experience. ![Screenshots](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/ZA/BH_ZA_Screenshots.webp) ![Screenshots 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/xfig3m37/images/ac83754ab8c1ae55d7f5b805f92dcb9a8d06e599.jpeg) [![DISCORD](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/MultiRecipe/BH_Lupin_Discord.webp)](https://discord.gg/X8VY5WMbe4) .
